daily.today_energy: Your vibe is magnetic today, Leo. There's a quiet confidence flowing through you—the kind that doesn't need to announce itself. Lean into that understated power and watch how people gravitate toward your presence.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, there's potential for a deeper conversation happening beneath the surface. Single? Someone's noticing you, but the real magic starts when you're fully yourself, not performing. Authenticity is your love language right now.
daily.career: Your ideas have weight today. This is the moment to speak up in that meeting or share what you've been sitting on. Your perspective offers something valuable—trust that instinct and let it lead without overthinking.
daily.health: Your body's asking for intentional movement today—something that feels good, not punishing. Whether that's a walk, stretching, or dancing to your favorite song, tune in to what brings you alive. Energy flows where attention goes.

weekly.overview: This week's cosmic energy is asking you to embrace your authentic self, Leo. There's a magnetic pull toward meaningful conversations and deeper connections. Trust the timing of things unfolding around you.
weekly.love: Venus is whispering sweet possibilities into your orbit. Whether you're coupled or single, emotional honesty is your superpower right now. Let someone see the real you beneath the sparkle.
weekly.career: Your creative instincts are firing on all cylinders. This is the week to pitch that idea you've been sitting on or take on a project that genuinely excites you. Your passion is contagious.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for intentional movement and rest in equal measure. Find activities that feel joyful rather than obligatory—dancing, walking, whatever makes you feel alive and grounded.
